name: pack_1
title: Preemptive Action and the Iran Crisis
description: A 15-delegation simulation evaluating the legality and consequences of preemptive military action against sovereign states, set in the context of an escalating conflict involving the Islamic Republic of Iran.
topic: Evaluating the legality and consequences of preemptive military action against sovereign states in the context of escalating conflict involving the Islamic Republic of Iran.
expected_runtime: long: ~15 LLM calls per general_debate phase, more during caucuses
